channel.title: Qdrant on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Qdrant on DevOpsTales

item.title: Kilo Code: Mastering Codebase Indexing for Semantic AI Search
item.description: One of the most powerful features of Kilo Code is its ability to understand your entire codebase semantically—not just through keyword matching, but by grasping the actual meaning and relationships in your code.

item.title: Kilo Code: Codebase Indexing with Nomic and Qdrant
item.description: In our previous post, we explored the different modes of Kilo Code. While these modes are powerful, their effectiveness depends on the quality of the context they can access.
